message:
fix(scripting): specific error messages for FCALL/EVAL numkeys validation

Added CommandError::Custom variant. parse_eval_args now returns:
- "ERR Number of keys can't be negative" for negative numkeys
- "ERR Number of keys can't be greater than number of args" for
  numkeys exceeding available arguments

Affects EVAL, EVALSHA, EVAL_RO, EVALSHA_RO, FCALL, FCALL_RO.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
